zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Grante於1541年出生在英國貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德時，她的父親Thomas Grante23歲，母親Sarah Robinson21歲。她於1563年10月30日與Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll在英國英格蘭貝德福爾艾也沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1617年在英國德比夏爾德比享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Grante于1541年出生在英国貝德福爾比格萊斯瓦德时，她的父亲Thomas Grante23岁，母亲Sarah Robinson21岁。她于1563年10月30日与Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll在英国英格兰貝德福爾艾也沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1617年在英国德比夏爾德比享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grante
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Granit: from German Granit ‘granite’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Grante was born in 1541, in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Grante, was 23 and her mother, Sarah Robinson, was 21. She married Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll on 30 October 1563, in Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1617, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Grante est née en 1541, à Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Grante, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sarah Robinson, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll le 30 octobre 1563, à Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1617, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Grante 1541 in Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Grante 23 und ihre Mutter Sarah Robinson 21. Sie hat am 30. Oktober 1563 in Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1617 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Grante è nata il nel 1541 nel Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Grante, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sarah Robinson, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll il 30 ottobre 1563, nel Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1617, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Granteが1541年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアビググレスワドで生まれた時，父Thomas Granteは23歳，母Sarah Robinsonは21歳であった。1563年10月30日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアエイエウオルスでRobert Geoffrey Ingorsollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1617年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Grante(이)가 1541년 영국 베드퍼드실르 비글레스웨이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Grante(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Robinson(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1563년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 예워스에서 Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1617년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Grante nasceu em 1541, em Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Grante, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Robinson, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll em 30 de outubro de 1563, em Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1617, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Grante родилась в 1541 г. в местности биглесвад, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Grante было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Robinson, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll 30 октября 1563 г. в местности эиюорт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1617 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Grante nació en 1541, en Biggleswade, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Grante, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sarah Robinson, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Robert Geoffrey Ingorsoll el 30 de octubre de 1563, en Eyeworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1617, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
